pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Astro Boy (Sleeping Version) 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Astro Boy (Sleeping Version) 100% & 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature the heroic and adventurous Astro Boy taking a well-deserved nap.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick collectible set to your collection today!
